# <type>(<scope>): <subject>   ── max 50 chars, imperative, no trailing period
#
# <body>   ── what & why (not how), wrap at 72 chars
#
# <footer>  ── BREAKING CHANGE: ... | Closes #123
#
# ── Conventional Commits ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# type:  feat     new feature
#        fix      bug fix
#        docs     documentation only
#        style    formatting, no code change
#        refactor neither fix nor feature
#        perf     performance
#        test     adding/fixing tests
#        build    build system or deps
#        ci       CI config
#        chore    other (tooling, deps)
#        revert   reverts a previous commit
# scope: auth | prisma | redis | health | docs | docker | config ...
# Example: feat(auth): add API key authentication strategy
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
